event.description: Detection of a potential DDoS attack by the ML algorithm
event.boolean_expression: ( (#em_predict_attack(cicflow_data.Flow_ID, cicflow_data.Src_IP, cicflow_data.Src_Port, cicflow_data.Dst_IP, cicflow_data.Dst_Port, cicflow_data.Protocol, cicflow_data.Timestamp, cicflow_data.Flow_Duration, cicflow_data.Total_Fwd_Packet, cicflow_data.Total_Bwd_packets, cicflow_data.Total_Length_of_Fwd_Packet, cicflow_data.Total_Length_of_Bwd_Packet, cicflow_data.Fwd_Packet_Length_Max, cicflow_data.Fwd_Packet_Length_Min, cicflow_data.Fwd_Packet_Length_Mean, cicflow_data.Fwd_Packet_Length_Std, cicflow_data.Bwd_Packet_Length_Max, cicflow_data.Bwd_Packet_Length_Min, cicflow_data.Bwd_Packet_Length_Mean, cicflow_data.Bwd_Packet_Length_Std, cicflow_data.Flow_Bytes_per_s, cicflow_data.Flow_Packets_per_s, cicflow_data.Flow_IAT_Mean, cicflow_data.Flow_IAT_Std, cicflow_data.Flow_IAT_Max, cicflow_data.Flow_IAT_Min, cicflow_data.Fwd_IAT_Total, cicflow_data.Fwd_IAT_Mean, cicflow_data.Fwd_IAT_Std, cicflow_data.Fwd_IAT_Max, cicflow_data.Fwd_IAT_Min, cicflow_data.Bwd_IAT_Total, cicflow_data.Bwd_IAT_Mean, cicflow_data.Bwd_IAT_Std, cicflow_data.Bwd_IAT_Max, cicflow_data.Bwd_IAT_Min, cicflow_data.Fwd_PSH_Flags, cicflow_data.Bwd_PSH_Flags, cicflow_data.Fwd_URG_Flags, cicflow_data.Bwd_URG_Flags, cicflow_data.Fwd_Header_Length, cicflow_data.Bwd_Header_Length, cicflow_data.Fwd_Packets_per_s, cicflow_data.Bwd_Packets_per_s, cicflow_data.Packet_Length_Min, cicflow_data.Packet_Length_Max, cicflow_data.Packet_Length_Mean, cicflow_data.Packet_Length_Std, cicflow_data.Packet_Length_Variance, cicflow_data.FIN_Flag_Count, cicflow_data.SYN_Flag_Count, cicflow_data.RST_Flag_Count, cicflow_data.PSH_Flag_Count, cicflow_data.ACK_Flag_Count, cicflow_data.URG_Flag_Count, cicflow_data.CWR_Flag_Count, cicflow_data.ECE_Flag_Count, cicflow_data.Down_per_Up_Ratio, cicflow_data.Average_Packet_Size, cicflow_data.Fwd_Segment_Size_Avg, cicflow_data.Bwd_Segment_Size_Avg, cicflow_data.Fwd_Bytes_per_Bulk_Avg, cicflow_data.Fwd_Packet_per_Bulk_Avg, cicflow_data.Fwd_Bulk_Rate_Avg, cicflow_data.Bwd_Bytes_per_Bulk_Avg, cicflow_data.Bwd_Packet_per_Bulk_Avg, cicflow_data.Bwd_Bulk_Rate_Avg, cicflow_data.Subflow_Fwd_Packets, cicflow_data.Subflow_Fwd_Bytes, cicflow_data.Subflow_Bwd_Packets, cicflow_data.Subflow_Bwd_Bytes, cicflow_data.FWD_Init_Win_Bytes, cicflow_data.Bwd_Init_Win_Bytes, cicflow_data.Fwd_Act_Data_Pkts, cicflow_data.Fwd_Seg_Size_Min, cicflow_data.Active_Mean, cicflow_data.Active_Std, cicflow_data.Active_Max, cicflow_data.Active_Min, cicflow_data.Idle_Mean, cicflow_data.Idle_Std, cicflow_data.Idle_Max, cicflow_data.Idle_Min, cicflow_data.Label, cicflow_data.id) == 1 ) )
